---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the template is broken or wrong
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## What happened

What went wrong? (error message, screenshot, log snippet)

## How to reproduce

Steps to reproduce the issue. The smaller the reproducer, the better.

```bash
# Commands you ran
```

## Expected

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- iac-tfm version: (git commit SHA or tag)
- Terraform version: `terraform version`
- AWS provider version: `terraform providers`
- AWS region: e.g. `ap-southeast-2`
- OS: e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04

## Context

Anything else that might help — module names, env name, etc.
